PR surface: Source +127, Tests +103, Docs +4. Total +234 across 10 files.

target.title: refactor(plugin-sdk): split session and delivery thread ids
target.body:
## Summary

- Add explicit `replyToThread` / `thread` SDK inputs with separate `sessionThreadId` and `deliveryThreadId` values.
- Deprecate legacy `replyToId` / `threadId` inputs while keeping compatibility, and migrate bundled channel plugins to the new API.
- Update Telegram routing so persisted session identity can include the chat/topic scope while native delivery keeps the numeric topic id.
- Document the new SDK shape and recovered-thread mapping guidance.

## Verification

- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugin-sdk/core.ts src/plugin-sdk/thread-aware-outbound-session-route.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/channel.ts extensions/discord/src/outbound-session-route.ts extensions/slack/src/channel.ts extensions/qa-channel/src/channel.ts extensions/clickclack/src/channel.ts extensions/matrix/src/session-route.ts extensions/mattermost/src/session-route.ts docs/plugins/sdk-channel-plugins.md`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/thread-aware-outbound-session-route.test.ts` (14 tests)
- Testbox `tbx_01ksyd2eyhehe2g9cbnk0g4kg2`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/thread-aware-outbound-session-route.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/session-route.test.ts` (14 SDK tests, 5 Telegram tests)
- Testbox `tbx_01ksyd8mdkg3zbrma2p3kta8sx`: `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm check:changed`
- Autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: thread-aware outbound routing now represents persisted session thread identity separately from native provider delivery metadata.
Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox on Linux via OpenClaw CI workflow.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/thread-aware-outbound-session-route.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/session-route.test.ts`; `OPENCLAW_TESTBOX=1 pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: Testbox `tbx_01ksyd2eyhehe2g9cbnk0g4kg2` passed targeted SDK and Telegram tests; Testbox `tbx_01ksyd8mdkg3zbrma2p3kta8sx` passed changed gate.
Observed result after fix: SDK helper preserves deprecated alias behavior, keeps explicit session/delivery ids separate, normalizes explicit string delivery ids, and keeps Telegram topic delivery ids numeric.
What was not tested: live provider delivery against Discord, Slack, Matrix, Mattermost, QA channel, or ClickClack.
target.author: steipete
